product_overview: Horarios UNT is a web system for managing academic scheduling at UNT EIS, covering the creation of academic periods, master data maintenance, availability declaration, schedule assignment, conflict resolution, and report generation. It also supports real-time window-based scheduling and self-service schedule viewing for teachers.
core_goals: Log in and access the appropriate role-based workspace
Create and maintain academic scheduling master data such as docentes, cursos, ambientes, periodos, and usuarios
Declare and manage teacher availability across the weekly timetable
Assign, review, and adjust academic schedules while detecting and resolving conflicts
Operate real-time scheduling windows and queue sessions for staff-assisted assignment
View, export, and generate schedules and reports for teachers, rooms, cycles, and management

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Users sign in with email and password to access the system with role-based routing.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard after successful authentication
Navigate to /login -> Enter incorrect credentials -> Submit the login form -> See an invalid credentials message

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated users review key scheduling indicators, charts, conflict summaries, and schedule generation actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/dashboard -> Review KPI cards -> Review coverage chart -> Review conflict distribution chart -> Review the heatmap and conflict list
Navigate to /app/dashboard -> Review conflicts that need attention -> Resolve a conflict -> See the updated conflict list
Navigate to /app/dashboard -> Start schedule generation -> See the generated schedules reflected in the dashboard

features.name: Docente Management
features.description: Admins and authorized staff manage teacher records, search and filter the list, edit details, delete records, and preview schedules.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/docentes -> Review the paginated teacher list -> Apply filters and search by name or surname -> Observe the list update with active filter chips
Navigate to /app/docentes -> Open the new teacher form -> Enter teacher details -> Save the record -> See the teacher added to the list
Navigate to /app/docentes -> Open an existing teacher for editing -> Update the teacher information -> Save the changes -> See the updated record in the list
Navigate to /app/docentes -> Open a teacher record -> Preview the teacher schedule -> Review the schedule view
Navigate to /app/docentes -> Choose a teacher for deletion -> Confirm the deletion -> See the record removed from the list

features.name: Curso Management
features.description: Users manage courses, search and filter them, edit course details, organize groups, and assign compatible environments.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/cursos -> Review the paginated course list -> Apply filters and search by name or code -> Observe the list update with active filter chips
Navigate to /app/cursos -> Open the new course form -> Enter course data -> Save the course -> See the course added to the list
Navigate to /app/cursos -> Open an existing course for editing -> Update course details and group assignments -> Save the changes -> See the updated course information
Navigate to /app/cursos -> Open the group management dialog -> Add or edit a group -> Save the group -> See the group reflected in the course configuration
Navigate to /app/cursos -> Open a course for environment assignment -> Select compatible environments by class type -> Save the assignment -> See the environment mapping applied
Navigate to /app/cursos -> Choose a course for deletion -> Confirm deletion -> See the course removed from the list
Navigate to /app/cursos -> Choose a removed course -> Reactivate the course -> See the course return to the list

features.name: Ambiente Management
features.description: Users manage rooms and labs, filter by type or capacity, inspect campus map view, and maintain occupancy-related records.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/ambientes -> Review the paginated environment list -> Apply type, capacity, or search filters -> Observe the list update
Navigate to /app/ambientes -> Switch to the campus map view -> Review environment locations and occupancy indicators
Navigate to /app/ambientes -> Open the new environment form -> Enter environment details -> Save the record -> See the environment added to the list
Navigate to /app/ambientes -> Open an environment for editing -> Update its details -> Save the changes -> See the updated environment in the list
Navigate to /app/ambientes -> Choose an environment for deletion -> Confirm deletion -> See the record removed from the list

features.name: Academic Period Management
features.description: Authorized users create and maintain academic periods and progress them through their state lifecycle.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/configuracion -> Access period management -> Create a new academic period -> Save it -> See the new period available for use
Navigate to /app/periodos -> Open an academic period -> Update its dates or state -> Save the changes -> See the period move to the updated state

features.name: Scheduling Configuration
features.description: Users configure system scheduling parameters such as turns, restrictions, load parameters, and institutional settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/configuracion -> Review scheduling configuration sections -> Update turnos, restrictions, or load parameters -> Save the configuration -> See the new settings reflected
Navigate to /app/configuracion -> Review the configured periods and campaign settings -> Update the relevant configuration -> Save the changes -> See the updated configuration

features.name: Disponibilidad Docente
features.description: Teachers or authorized staff manage weekly availability by selecting a teacher and toggling time slots in the weekly grid.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/disponibilidad -> Select a teacher -> Review the weekly availability grid -> Toggle available time slots -> See the changes saved automatically
Navigate to /app/disponibilidad -> Select a teacher -> Switch between configured turns -> Review how the available slots change -> Continue adjusting availability
Navigate to /app/disponibilidad -> Select a teacher -> Toggle a previously selected slot off -> See the slot removed from the availability grid

features.name: Horarios
features.description: Users view schedules in multiple perspectives, edit assignments, delete entries, clear schedules for a period, and export schedule-related reports.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/horarios -> Switch between schedule views by teacher, room, cycle, day, conflicts, and management -> Review the grid for the selected perspective
Navigate to /app/horarios -> Open an assignment for editing -> Update the schedule entry -> Save the change -> See the revised assignment in the grid
Navigate to /app/horarios -> Select a schedule entry for deletion -> Confirm the deletion -> See the entry removed from the schedule
Navigate to /app/horarios -> Choose to clear schedules for a period -> Confirm the action -> See the schedules for that period removed
Navigate to /app/horarios -> Export the current schedule view -> Download the generated PDF or Excel file

features.name: Operador / Ventanas
features.description: Secretaria and scheduling operators manage service windows, queues, in-session assignments, and real-time selection of timetable cells.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/secretaria/ventanas -> Create a scheduling window -> Save it -> See the window appear in the list
Navigate to /app/secretaria/ventanas -> Open an existing window -> Start the session -> See the queue and schedule grid become available
Navigate to /app/secretaria/ventanas -> Call the next person in the queue -> Confirm the action -> See the next teacher move into attention
Navigate to /app/secretaria/ventanas -> Mark a person as absent -> Confirm the action -> See the queue status update
Navigate to /app/secretaria/ventanas -> Select schedule cells for a teacher -> Review the validation result -> Confirm the selection -> See the assignment applied
Navigate to /app/secretaria/ventanas -> Finish the session -> Confirm the action -> See the window return to a closed state

features.name: Reportes
features.description: Users generate downloadable PDF reports for teacher, room, operational, and management contexts.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/reportes -> Select a report type -> Choose the required parameters -> Download the PDF report -> See the file generated
Navigate to /app/reportes -> Select an operational or management report type -> Choose the reporting parameters -> Download the report -> See the file generated

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: Users review analytics related to schedule saturation, utilization, and system KPIs.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/analytics -> Review KPI metrics and utilization indicators -> Inspect saturation and workload visuals -> Identify areas needing attention

features.name: Docente Self-Service Schedule
features.description: Teachers view their personal schedule and download it for offline use.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/mis-horarios -> Review the personal schedule view -> Inspect the assigned classes -> Download the schedule as PDF or Excel

other: SCSS custom design system (variables, glassmorphism, skeleton, dark/light themes)

routes.description: User login with email and password, JWT token storage
Main dashboard with KPIs, charts, conflict list, heatmap, auto-generate schedules
System configuration, turnos, restricciones, parametros carga, period/campaign management
Docente CRUD with pagination, filters, search, edit, delete, schedule preview
Curso CRUD with pagination, filters, group management, ambiente assignment
Ambiente CRUD with map campus view, type/capacity filters, occupancy indicators
Academic period CRUD with state machine
Scheduling campaign CRUD with block configuration and priority rules
Window-based scheduling system (queue, grid, session management)
Schedule views (by docente, ambiente, ciclo, dia, conflictos, gestion), PDF/Excel export
Docente availability weekly grid with slot management and auto-save
Teaching load declarations with verification, signing, and approval chain
PDF report generation for docente, ambiente, operacional, gestion
KPI analytics, saturation, utilization, AI suggestions
Docente self-service schedule view and PDF/Excel download

features.name: Authentication (Login)
features.description: JWT-based login with role-based redirect, password change, token refresh
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: KPI cards, doughnut/bar charts, conflict list, heatmap, period progress, auto-generate
user_interactions: View KPI cards (docentes, cursos, ambientes, horarios)
See conflict list with resolution actions
Click retry button on error state

features.name: Docente CRUD
features.description: Paginated list with search/filter, create/edit form, delete confirmation, schedule preview
user_interactions: View paginated list with skeleton shimmer loader
Filter by facultad, departamento, estado, search by nombre/apellido
See active filter indicator chips with "Clear filters" button
Click edit icon to open form with pre-filled data
Click delete icon to see confirmation dialog

features.name: Curso CRUD
features.description: Paginated list with search/filter, create/edit with grupo management and ambiente assignment
user_interactions: View paginated list with skeleton shimmer loader
Filter by nivel, ciclo, search by nombre/codigo
See active filter indicator chips with "Clear filters" button
Click edit icon to open form with grupos and ambientes
Assign ambientes to curso by tipo_clase (TEORIA/LABORATORIO)

features.name: Ambiente CRUD
features.description: Paginated list with type/capacity filters, map campus view, occupancy indicators
user_interactions: View list with filters by tipo, capacidad, search

features.name: Operador / Ventanas
features.description: Window-based scheduling system with queue, real-time grid, session management, WebSocket
user_interactions: Call next person in queue ("Llamar Siguiente" with confirmation)
Mark person as absent ("Marcar Ausente" with confirmation)
Select/deselect cells in schedule grid for a docente
Finalizar sesión / Salir modo edición with confirmation dialogs

features.name: Horarios (Schedule Views)
features.description: Multi-tab schedule views (docente, ambiente, ciclo, dia, conflictos, gestion), export

user_interactions.Switch tabs: Por Docente, Por Ambiente, Por Ciclo, Por Día, Conflictos, Gestión

user_interactions: View schedule grid with sticky first column (hora)
Export to PDF/Excel from various views
Limpiar (clear) all schedules for a period

features.name: Disponibilidad Docente
features.description: Weekly availability grid for docentes with drag/click slot management
user_interactions: View weekly grid (Lun-Sáb) with time slots

features.name: Reportes PDF
features.description: PDF and Excel report generation for schedules and management
user_interactions: Select report type (docente, ambiente, operacional, gestion)

known_limitations.issue: Duplicate route for /app/notificaciones (two loadChildren entries, second overrides first)
known_limitations.impact: The second definition wins — may cause confusion if first is expected to apply

known_limitations.issue: PreasignacionesModule and AuditoriaModule are lazy modules with their own routes but NOT referenced in app-routing.module.ts
known_limitations.impact: These modules are unreachable via navigation

known_limitations.issue: MatrizSeleccionService references this.socket.validacionFallida$ but SocketService does not expose it
known_limitations.impact: Runtime error when validation webhook fires
Badge shows static 3 instead of real count from API

known_limitations.issue: Very low test coverage — only 4 spec files found for 20+ modules
known_limitations.impact: Most components have zero automated test coverage

known_limitations.issue: ChatbotModule is eagerly loaded in LayoutModule instead of lazy
known_limitations.impact: Chatbot code included in initial bundle, increasing load time

known_limitations.issue: BrowserAnimationsModule imported in AppModule, AuthModule, and LayoutModule
known_limitations.impact: Should only be imported once in root module
